== Notes for [[Item:Q109222|Q109222]] ==

* '''8th Abbasid Caliph'''
* Reign:

Source 1:

Source 2: http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Mutasim

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zubaidah_bint_Ja%60far

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harun_al-Rashid

----

In 802, Harun al-Rashid gave his third son , al-Qasim, whom he had surnamed al-Motasim, Armenia, Natolia, Jurjan, Georgia, Circassia and all the Moslem territoes bordering upon the Euxine sea. al Motsim is thrid and last in the order of succession after his father's decease in 809.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
